date_notes: Vote held September 28-29 2025 per notwithstanding analysis. Result: 89.5% rejection. ATA source URL: teachers.ab.ca/News Room/ata news/Pages/Teachers-reject-tentative-agreement.aspx (ev_005).
title_en: Teachers vote 89.5% to reject tentative agreement
title_fr: Les enseignants votent à 89,5 % contre l'accord de principe
description_en: ATA members vote 89.5% to reject a tentative agreement reached in central bargaining — one of the highest rejection rates in Canadian teacher bargaining history. The rejected agreement had offered a 12% wage increase over four years (approximately 3% annually against 2–3% annual inflation), leaving teachers' real wages flat. Teachers also rejected the agreement for its failure to include binding class-size caps and adequate educational assistant commitments. Median teacher salary at time of vote: approximately $70,000. The 12% offer would have brought that to approximately $78,400 over four years.
